summary: P0 Branch/Warehouse Consolidation - All tests passed. Backend warehouse endpoints now alias to branches collection (_source='branches'). Frontend sidebar shows 'Cabang/Gudang' in Master Data menu, standalone 'Cabang' removed from Pengaturan. Dashboard shows 'Total Cabang' card with branches count (102).
critical_code_review_comments: Backend warehouse endpoints correctly return data from branches collection with _source='branches'
Warehouse data includes branch_id = id (self-reference) as designed
POST /api/master/warehouses creates entry in branches collection with _created_via='warehouse_endpoint'
Sidebar 'Cabang/Gudang' correctly placed in Master Data > Referensi section
Dashboard 'Total Cabang' card shows correct count from branches collection
seed_data_creation: Test warehouse created and cleaned up during test_04
context_for_next_testing_agent: Branch/Warehouse consolidation complete. Warehouses endpoint (/api/master/warehouses) returns data from branches collection. Menu 'Cabang/Gudang' in Master Data links to /settings/branches. No duplicate menu items.
